description:
A zero-knowledge encrypted workspace for your documents, notes, and files.

Ciphra is a private, zero-knowledge encrypted desktop application built with Tauri and Convex.
Every single byte of your data — documents, folder names, file names, images, and PDFs — is encrypted on your device using AES-256-GCM before it ever leaves to the cloud.
It features a BIP39 12-word mnemonic authentication, a rich text editor, secure media viewer, custom folder systems, app lock, and seamless auto-updates.
